nasb.text: ‘Then on the fifteenth day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation; you shall do no laborious work, and you shall observe a feast to the Lord for seven days.

esv.text: “On the fifteenth day of the seventh month you shall have a holy convocation. You shall not do any ordinary work, and you shall keep a feast to the Lord seven days.

cnv.text: “‘七月十五日，你們要有聖會；甚麼勞碌的工都不可作，要向耶和華守節七天；

ccb.text: “在七月十五日那一天，你们要举行圣会，不可工作，为耶和华守节期七天。
